S.R: 498(E)—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 30 read with Section 3 of the Railway Claims ; Tribunal Act, 1987 (54 of 1987), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Railway : Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1989, namely -~— tf. (1) These rules may be called the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Amendment Rules, 2006. (2) They shall come into force with effect from 1-10-2006. 2. In Schedule | to the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1989, (1) for serial number 8 and entries relating thereto the following serial number and entries shall be substituted, namely :— ‘8 Calcutta (2) , West Bengal, Union Territory of Andaman and Nicobar Islands” (2) for seriai number 15 and entries reiating thereto the foiiowing seriai number and entries shall be substituted, namely —— “15, Patna Bihar. 1SA. Ranchi “! Jharkhand” . . ‘ . [F.No.95/TC(RCTY5-1/Part Ul] B.L. MEENA, Executive Director, Public Grievances, Railway Board.
